details: Beginning self-reflection analysis of layer_norm_rm pipeline run (run1, 2026-03-11)
All evidence gathered. Building timeline, analyzing 5 hypotheses from kernel-writer, 1 from builder, cross-referencing known issues.

Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 4 new pipeline improvements added (#12-#15). Top findings: bf16 tolerance scaling needed (5 hard attempts wasted), fp32_dest_acc/tilize incompatibility undocumented (2 hard attempts), precision floor detection missing.
